plugins.description: Swift language server for code intelligence.

skills.name: swiftui
skills.description: SwiftUI Agent Skill (Hacking with Swift), curated in Paul Hudson's twostraws/swift-agent-skills directory - current-idiom SwiftUI patterns (state, layout, data flow) beyond raw API. Free/local. NOTE: this is a curated DIRECTORY, not a single-repo skill - verify the exact skill/slug in the directory at install; version-pinned skills (Swift/iOS N) should match your toolchain.

_notes: See README.md's 'Related tools' section for iOS non-plugin tools (xclaude-plugin) and UI/design handoff.
